items.title: Tracking Ken Fisher's Fisher Asset Management Portfolio - Q2 2025 Update
items.description: Fisher Asset Management's 13F portfolio grew from ~$231B to ~$252B in Q2 2025. Click here to read more about the trades and holdings in the portfolio.

items.title: 10 Financials Stocks Whale Activity In Today's Session
Bank of America Isn’t Sold on These 2 New Warren Buffett Stock Picks
items.description: We’ll see the end of an era later this year, when investing legend Warren Buffett steps down from his leadership at Berkshire Hathaway. Over the past sixty years, Buffett’s investing strategy has turned the firm into a trillion-dollar giant, with powerful positions in the insurance, tech, and energy sectors. He’s known as a major backer of American brand names, and has long held multi-billion positions in Apple, American Express, and Coca-Cola. Buffett is particularly well-known for his promotio

items.title: Here's Why Berkshire Hathaway Stock Is a Buy Before November
items.author: Leo Sun
items.description: Berkshire Hathaway's stock has underperformed the S&P 500 in the past year, with challenges including Warren Buffett's upcoming retirement and conservative investment strategies. Despite these concerns, the company remains fundamentally strong with potential for continued growth.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Underperformed market recently, but has stable core businesses, consistent earnings growth, and potential for future expansion under new leadership
